title: CMD.BSP.001.TIE.APPLY_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE — Apply a prescriber tier override
description: Payload of the APPLY_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE command. Issued by BNK.RLVR.CAP.CHN.002.VUE on prescriber action, handled by AGG.BSP.001.TIE.TIER_OF_CASE. Emits BNK.RLVR.RVT.OVERRIDE_ACTIVATED with paired BNK.RLVR.EVT.TIER_OVERRIDE_APPLIED. Idempotent on override_id (caller-supplied UUID) over a 30-day window. Rejects if an override is already active.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case.

override_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Caller-supplied UUID for the override. Replay-safe across the bus — a duplicate POST with the same override_id is a no-op.

prescriber_id.description: Identifier of the prescriber issuing the override. Authorised through BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.001 — the aggregate trusts the bearer-token identity injected by the API layer.

applied_tier_code.description: Tier code the prescriber forces on the case. Validated against the current BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE definition snapshot (INV.TIE.003).

rationale.description: Human-readable justification recorded for audit (visible to ARB during validation).

valid_until.description: Optional — when set, the override is considered candidate for closure after this timestamp. The actual closure still goes through ARB.

issued_at.description: Timestamp of the prescriber action (ISO-8601, UTC). Used for ordering, NOT for idempotency.
